reviews.author: Paul Parent
reviews.text: Co Thach Beach is a hidden gem along Vietnam’s Binh Thuan coastline, offering a perfect blend of natural beauty and tranquility. The long stretch of white sand, dotted with unique rock formations, creates a stunning backdrop for leisurely walks, photography, or simply relaxing by the sea. The water is clear and calm, ideal for swimming or wading, while the gentle waves add to the peaceful ambiance. Sunrise and sunset here are truly spectacular, painting the sky in vibrant hues that reflect beautifully on the sand and water. Visitors will also appreciate the nearby fishing villages, which provide a glimpse of local life and fresh seafood that is both authentic and delicious. The beach is far enough from the main tourist hubs to feel private, yet easily accessible by car or motorbike. Co Thach Beach is perfect for anyone seeking a quiet escape, scenic views, and the simple pleasures of the Vietnamese coast. Whether for a day trip or a longer visit, it leaves a lasting impression with its serene atmosphere and natural charm.

reviews.author: Ho Ngoc Tin
reviews.text: The beach is so beautiful, a lot of nice gravel, still don't understand how natural can make it, just don't like a lot of motels and restaurants near the beach.

reviews.author: Thiep Mai Phuc
reviews.text: When traveling to Co Thach beach, you will be able to touch these unique multicolored ancient stones. In particular, around the middle of the week in March every year, the entire rocky beach will turn green by the green moss, then return to the original multi-colored state extremely fanciful. Not only that, the sea here is also especially clear and unspoiled. Next to the beach are some small eateries with affordable prices...

reviews.author: Dinh Thang
reviews.text: Co Thach Beach consists of a one-kilometer stretch of pebble beach with a decent sand section, all situated against a backdrop of beautiful granite hills and ocean dunes. However, the unsightly proliferation of guesthouses and restaurants detracts from the uncommon natural beauty. The pebbles at Co Thach are intriguing to geologists because they represent the ages-long influence of ocean waves on loose rock particles created by exfoliation of the ancient coastal granite hills. From February through April, Co Thach Beach is known for its moss season, when the boulders and half-submerged rock field are covered in gleaming green moss. Many young people flock to the area around this time to take stylish photos with the mossy rocks.

reviews.author: Khoa Vo
reviews.text: Co Thach is a famous beach located in Tuy Phong district, Binh Thuan province. Long time ago, this place has been known to many tourists as unspoiled beach. In particular, Co Thach beach is made up of colored stones. Therefore, in addition to the name Co Thach, this place is also known as the “rock 7 color”.

reviews.author: Long Do
reviews.text: I think this is very special beach in Vietnam, instead of sand - there're many many small gravels with different colors! Wondetful place you should visit at least once in your life.

reviews.author: Uyên Phạm
reviews.text: Unfortunately the waves are very strong and the sky is cloudy so I could not enjoy the blue of the sea, but it is still nice going there

reviews.author: Bích Vân Trần
reviews.text: Nice beach, wanna go back there with friends :))

reviews.author: Du Do
reviews.text: The beach is nice with moderate waves. Very good place enjoy the sunset.

reviews.author: Long Bùi
reviews.text: I love the view and how natural the place is. The place is very worth to come, visit and enjoy. BUT the local people tend to rip off travelers here. I stayed here for 5 nights and the issues must be not having good and quality meals here. Also, there are many rubbish/gabbages on the beach because of Vietnamese travelers, people should protect their own environment instead of throwing trash that way. Out of that, the place I stayed is a good place not because of the quality of the hostel, but the male owner is a very kind person, he charges me with very reasonable price for 5 nights since I was alone and really in need of having a place to rest, maybe it was also because I am a female. Other hostels/hotels charge higher fee and also they didn't even want to have a single guest because they knew they will not make a good money from me. I highly recommend SONG ÉN Hotel if the people come here and stay. 2 days to stay here is enough. If the food is good, the whole week for me wont be any problem :)

reviews.author: Tue Nguyen Phuoc
reviews.text: Just popular as a nice rock emerging from the sea and well known during the sea weed season during January and February. Beach is just fine, local families offer basic accommodation and one day facilities for one quick day visit. Only crowdy during weekends as well as holiday seasons. Close to the popular Co Thach pagoda.

reviews.author: Quynh Trang Vu (Keisha)
reviews.text: Many trash on the beach. Please don't thrown trash anymore.

reviews.author: Nguyen Anh
reviews.text: My mom likes the place because of the seven colored stones. I think it's fun when sitting and collecting the stones with my mom. There is a Buddhist temple but there are also too many beggars there, even the children are begging. My mom told me that the children are begging for money to buy toys, they're not poor...

reviews.author: Huỳnh Hải Long
reviews.text: A wide array of natural stones, beautiful beach. If the beach were cleaner, it would attract more visitors.

reviews.author: Ngân Lương
reviews.text: Small local beach, not much moss this season

reviews.author: Thuy Truong
reviews.text: Dirty beach ( garbage can be seen everwhere) ( raw sewage is pumped directly into the sea). Noisy atmosphere

reviews.author: Viet Quoc Nguyen
reviews.text: Very dirty even food and beach. There is no management here.

reviews.author: Duy Phạm Hoàng Phước
reviews.text: I didn't even know what to do here :)) The beach is dirty. There were even many people who organize gambling here publicly

reviews.author: Tu Nguyen M
reviews.text: Come at lunch coun’t swim but scence seems free and clean

reviews.author: Nidalee
reviews.text: Very fresh & cheap sea food, various shell.

reviews.author: Trần Hảo
reviews.text: Popular place to see the Sun rise in the South Vietnam

reviews.author: eoin jefferies
reviews.text: Unreal coastal ride here, ice coffee 10k
